notes: Core pac-man loop exists with ghosts, pellets, power pellets, and scoring, but the maze rendering is blocky/ugly (filled squares instead of proper wall outlines), ghost movement and collision feel imprecise, and the tile-crossing logic has noticeable jitter making smooth play difficult.
A solid and mostly complete Pac-Man clone, but ghost AI/maze behavior and presentation are simplified enough that it falls short of an authentic, polished benchmark-quality build.
